entity_types.name: CrisisEvent
entity_types.description: Significant occurrences related to the oil crisis.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: The official position held by the individual.

attributes.name: actions
attributes.description: Actions taken by the official during the crisis.

entity_types.name: MilitaryOrganization
entity_types.description: Military entities involved in the crisis.

attributes.name: country
attributes.description: The country the military organization belongs to.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: The role of the organization in the crisis.

entity_types.name: EconomicImpact
entity_types.description: Economic consequences resulting from the crisis.

attributes.name: date
attributes.description: The date when the impact was observed.

examples: Economic impacts spreading to US consumers

entity_types.name: MediaAppearance
entity_types.description: Instances of media coverage related to the crisis.

attributes.name: platform
attributes.description: The media platform where the appearance occurred.

entity_types.name: Threat
entity_types.description: Statements or actions that imply potential danger or escalation.
examples: Multiple ships struck in Persian Gulf

entity_types.name: ResourceRelease
entity_types.description: Release of resources in response to the crisis.
examples: IEA releases 400 million barrels from emergency reserves

entity_types.name: HistoricalContext
entity_types.description: Background information relevant to the crisis.

attributes.name: relevance
attributes.description: How the context is relevant to the crisis.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Generic person entity for unspecified roles.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: The role or occupation of the person.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Generic organization entity for unspecified roles.

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: The purpose or function of the organization.

edge_types.name: INVOLVED_IN
edge_types.description: Indicates involvement of an entity in an event.

edge_types.name: REPORTED_BY
edge_types.description: Indicates that a media appearance reported on an event or impact.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Indicates a response action to a threat or event.

edge_types.name: CAUSES
edge_types.description: Indicates a causal relationship between events and impacts.

edge_types.name: CONTEXT_FOR
edge_types.description: Provides historical context for current events.

edge_types.name: SUMMONED_BY
edge_types.description: Indicates that a person was summoned by another.

analysis_summary: The text describes a major geopolitical and economic crisis triggered by US-Israel military actions against Iran, leading to significant disruptions in global oil supply through the Strait of Hormuz. Key figures include US government officials and military organizations, with economic impacts and media coverage playing crucial roles. The ontology captures these dynamics, focusing on crisis events, involved entities, and their interactions.
